name: Fin of Sorrow
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield and HP Recovery increase by [StateArg1]% of their CON. The wielder's {Counter} dealt +[StateArg3]%. After playing Defense, gain {Counter} equal to [StateArg4]% of their DEF. At the start of battle, gain {STR} equal to [StateArg2]% of their CON. If the current realm is {Aequor}, gain additional {Tentacle DMG} of the same amount.
